changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'chk_page_type'

changeSet.comment: Update CHECK constraint to add CHILD_SAMPLE_CREATION and ASSAY_EXECUTION for pharmaceutical workflow.

changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Processing & Aliquoting page for Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Prepare samples for downstream analytical assays. Perform weighing, grinding, homogenization, extraction/dissolution. Create aliquots with parent-child traceability, including unique aliquot IDs and barcode/QR labels.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Assay & Test Execution page for Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform analytical testing with data integrity. Execute pharmaceutical assays (TLC, UV-Vis, FTIR, HPLC, titration, GC, LC-MS/MS), physical tests (dissolution, friability, hardness), and stability testing per ICH guidelines. Include positive/negative controls, internal standards, and replicates.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Storage & Inventory Management page for Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign samples to hierarchical storage (Room - Device - Rack - Box - Position). Set storage conditions per sample type: Pharmaceuticals (15-25C/2-8C/-20C), Biologicals (-80C/LN2), Microbiologicals (-80C stocks). Monitor environmental conditions and execute contingency plans for excursions.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Reporting & Performance Monitoring page for Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Generate routine reports (intake logs, utilization, TAT) and track laboratory performance metrics (QC pass rates, assay success rates). View real-time dashboards and create external reporting summaries for collaborators, regulatory agencies, and surveillance networks.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-pharma

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Disposal & Archiving page for Pharmaceuticals Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Close sample lifecycle compliantly. Dispose samples based on criteria (expiry, exhaustion, failed QC, safety). Apply material-specific disposal methods (incineration for pharmaceuticals, autoclaving for biologicals). Archive raw data, final reports, and lineage for 5-10 years per GxP/GMP requirements.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pharmaceuticals Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7
